name: lib-cost-of-ringing-out
caption:
The most expensive sound in your business is a phone ringing out.

Not the diesel, not the tools, not the insurance — the call you didn't answer. Because that one had a job attached.

Free audit — link in bio. 👇 Save this.

#tradesbusiness #plumber #electrician #missedcalls #ukandireland

slides.headline: The most expensive sound in your business.
slides.body: It's not what you think. Swipe.

slides.headline: Not the diesel.
slides.body: Not the tools, the van, or the insurance.

slides.headline: Because that one had a job attached.
slides.body: And it just walked to the trade who answered.

slides.headline: How many rang out this week?
